title: Agamyst RE
description: a reinvention of the look and feel of your game.Embark on an exciting adventure where your mining, crafting, building and battles will reach new heights!
body:
Agamyst RE reinvents the look of your tools, from picks to bows and everything in between. Each tool is carefully designed to maintain the essence of Minecraft; Each tool now reflects the material it is made of, from the shine of diamond to the sturdiness of iron, including the color palette of each material. Plus, with enhanced 3D models for your tools, each element comes to life in a whole new way, providing a more immersive gaming experience.
